name: @sriinnu/portpilot
description: Port management from your menu bar — monitor ports, discover daemons, proxy traffic, kill processes. macOS app + cross-platform CLI.

scripts.prebuild: which xcodegen > /dev/null 2>&1 && xcodegen generate || echo 'xcodegen not found, using existing project'
scripts.build: xcodebuild -project PortPilot.xcodeproj -scheme PortPilot -configuration Release -derivedDataPath .build/xcode build | tail -5
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:cli
scripts.install:cli: mkdir -p /usr/local/bin 2>/dev/null; cp .build/release/portpilot /usr/local/bin/portpilot && echo '✓ portpilot CLI installed to /usr/local/bin' || echo '⚠ CLI install needs: sudo cp .build/release/portpilot /usr/local/bin/'
scripts.postinstall: echo '⚠ PortPilot requires Swift 5.9+ to build. Run: npm run release'
scripts.release: npm run build:all && npm run install:app && npm run install:cli && node -e "const version=require('./package.json').version; console.log('✓ PortPilot v' + version + ' released!')"
scripts.uninstall: pkill -f PortPilot.app 2>/dev/null; rm -rf /Applications/PortPilot.app && rm -f /usr/local/bin/portpilot && echo '✓ PortPilot removed'
scripts.reinstall: npm run uninstall && npm run release

author: Srinivas Pendela
